---- begin message -----
Subject: Wanna popsicle? Really...
Body:
Hi there!
You don't have to be a kid to enjoy today's recipe.
These herbal popsicles are...
* Healthy
* Contain no sugar (just a little honey)
* High in vitamin C
* Replace electrolytes
* A remedy for an upset tummy
* Fun for kids of all ages to make
* Easy and cheap to make
* Super tasty
They contain 2 magic herbs that also make them a wonderful
remedy for a few common ailments.
Find out here...
http://www.learningherbs.com/news_issue_52.html
Yet another perfect example of our food being our medicine.
Enjoy!
John from LearningHerbs
P.S.
Wildcraft is JUST about back on sale. We're also giving away the
Kids & Herbs course. Find out about next week's celebration...
http://www.learningherbs.com/news_issue_52.html
----- end message -----
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

---- begin message -----
Subject: Wildcraft Summer Solstice Celebration...
Body:
Guess what?
Wildcraft: An Herbal Adventure Game is back in stock.
Let's celebrate the Summer Solstice with something to
light up your day.
Here is what we're going to do...
***Nearly 50% off the game, which is something we
usually only do around the Holidays.***
I know that might be enough for you, but we're
going to do something really unusual here.
Last year we sold a 7 hour webinar course called
"Kids & Herbs: A Naturally Simple Course for
Parents."
I designed it to meet the needs of many of the
parents who purchased Wildcraft. It's over 7 hours
of video/audio with transcripts. It's the perfect mini-
course for parents who are just getting started, and
also has great tips for experienced herbalists.
We sold this webinar series for $37, and today you
get it for nothin'.
So, here is a list of bonuses...
* Nearly 50% off Wildcraft
* Kids & Herbs 7 hour webinar series
* Dandelion Activity eBook
* Herbal Medicine Chest Chart (located in game)
* Herbal Remedies for Cold & Flu Season eBook
* Herbal Roots Zine Kids Activity Magazine
* a great mp3 on H1N1 and natural remedies
* Interview with Aviva Romm, MD on herbs & kids
* Elderberry syrup making video
* How to Make Herbal Lozenges Video
* How to Make a Chamomile Steam (for stuffy noses) video
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

---- begin message -----
Subject: Oops...forgot to say...
Body:
Hi again.
I got a bunch of emails yesterday asking me if "this was the
re-release" of the Kids & Herbs webinar series. Kids and Herbs is
a naturally simple course for parents on herbs and remedies that we
released for a limited time last Fall.
The answer is YES. This is the official re-release of Kids & Herbs,
and it will disappear again midnight on June 24.
The coolest part is that it's free. We're giving it away.
Therefore, if you wanted Kids & Herbs, go here...
http://www.learningherbs.com/wildcraft-sale.html
Sorry to send you a few emails about all this if you are not even
interested. It is a really rare thing, and we had so many people
interested in Kids & Herbs, I wanted to make sure the message got
across.
Cheers!
-John from LearningHerbs
P.S.
And hey, if you do not want a Wildcraft game and just want Kids &
Herbs, look at it this way... Just pretend you're buying Kids &
Herbs for 50% off and getting the game as a free bonus. Just a
matter of perspective. :)
http://www.learningherbs.com/wildcraft-sale.html
----- end message -----
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

NOTE FROM JOHN: That was it for the launch. Super easy to write. About an
extra hour of work. Remember, the relationship with the list was already built
since this was going to people I always give great, free stuff too.
This launch never took a sublist. It is rare I do sales like this to the entire list.
Really rare. So, I can get away with it every so often without annoying
people.
Note there is a 50% off sale PLUS a free webinar course. The OFFER is surely
irresistible. The offer is key.
Three emails sent that week. These emails, plus a sale to a different list the
week before resulted in over 800 sales and approximately $16,000.00 in
sales.
---- begin message -----
Subject: Why we're having the Wildcraft sale...
Body:
Well, tonight, June 24, at MIDNIGHT it's over.
Wildcraft! An Herbal Adventure Game at 50% off will go away.
Kids & Herbs: A Naturally Simple Course for parents
will once again disappear.
Why are we giving so much away for so little?
For the first time in 3 years, we were out of games.
It took us like 4 months to get them back in stock. It's
amazing how challenging it was for a small home biz to get
a bank loan. BUT...we did it! AND...We kind of feel like we
"owe you one" for being out of games for so long. :)
Once again, here is the list of what we have for you...
* Nearly 50% off the Wildcraft game
* Kids & Herbs 7 hour multi-media webinar series
* Dandelion Activity eBook
* Herbal Medicine Chest Chart (located in game)
* Herbal Remedies for Cold & Flu Season eBook
* Herbal Roots Zine Kids Activity eMagazine
* a great mp3 on h1n1 and natural remedies
* Interview with Aviva Romm, MD on herbs & kids (mp3)
* Elderberry syrup making video
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-John from LearningHerbs

P.P.S.
We appreciate you allowing us to email you this week about this

our list for awhile, you know that we mostly just give you lots
of free stuff and rarely sell like this. Every once in a while we
need to help support our ability to give you loads of free lessons.
The next email from us will be your next herbal mentoring lesson.
Cheers!
